# C Digi Vibe Co., Ltd.

> Strategic marketing, business transformation, and seamless event & media production for SMEs and corporate brands.

## Core Capabilities

### Business Services
- **SME Business Strategy & Planning:** Aligning operational infrastructure with scaling targets.
- **Business Transformation Consulting:** Redesigning workflow systems to resolve internal bottlenecks.
- **Strategy & Organizational Development:** Building structural foundations for business expansion.
- **Growth Planning & Business Scaling:** Standardizing operations for sustainable growth.

### Marketing Services
- **Marketing Strategy & Campaign Management:** Planning comprehensive digital market entry paths.
- **Growth Marketing & Brand Positioning:** Aligning market messages with performance funnels.
- **Social Media & Performance Advertising:** Configured and managed social ad spending pipelines.
- **Media Strategy, Planning & Buying:** Objective placement and ad optimization.

### Production Services
- **Media Production:** High-end professional corporate photography, videography, and digital assets.
- **Live Streaming & Recording:** Multi-camera live-streaming setups and outside broadcast (OB) logistics.
- **Event Management & Execution:** End-to-end planning, logistics, and on-site physical execution.
- **Experiential Marketing & Interactive Media:** Custom physical activations and interactive brand systems.

## Performance Metrics & Verified Success
- **+36% Operational Restructuring Growth:** Achieved for an SME partner within 9 months through workflow optimization.
- **40% Sales Ad Conversions:** Average conversion rate secured for clients within 2 months of social advertising campaigns.
